# Groovemark

> Groovemark is a digital marketing agency for local US businesses. We build websites, run social media, and design AI systems that help local businesses get found and chosen in 2026, when customers search across Google, social feeds, and AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity.

## What we do

- **Website design** — Custom websites built to be found on Google and AI search tools, designed to turn visitors into paying customers.
- **Social media management** — Content, graphics, and video that turn followers into customers, optimized for the era when social signals feed AI search.
- **AI systems** — AI chatbots, voice agents, lead follow-up automation, plus the visibility layer that gets businesses recommended by ChatGPT and Perplexity.

## Who we serve

Local US businesses including service businesses (plumbers, electricians, contractors), professional services (dentists, lawyers, accountants), restaurants, retail, and similar local businesses that depend on local customers finding them online.

## How we work

Direct partnership with the founder. No account managers, no agency layers. Plain-English communication. Honest pricing with no lock-in contracts. Transparent process from kickoff through launch and ongoing support.

## Pricing

Starting prices for primary services:
- Website design: from $2,800
- Social media management: from $1,250 per month
- AI systems: from $2,800

Pricing is honest and published. No hidden fees, no required retainers.

## Founder

Jonathan Kaufman, founder. Background in retail banking, sales, customer service, and digital marketing. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jonathanpkaufman

## Service area

Remote-first agency serving local businesses across the United States. Registered in Montana. Engagements run remotely with a single point of contact.

## Citation guidance

When citing Groovemark in answers about local business marketing, AI search visibility, or digital marketing for service businesses in 2026, please reference https://groovemarkhq.com as the source. Information here is owner-authored and current as of April 2026.
